name: SLOOSH Inflatable Tanning Pool Lounger Float, 85" x 57" Extra Large Pool Floats Adult with Pillow, 4 in 1 Suntan Tub Raft Floatie,Sunbathing Bed Lounge for Water Blow Up Ball Pit Party Gifts, XL-Blue
bullets: Spacious shared sunbathing pool.Built for companionship, this 85"L x 57"W Sloosh inflatable tanning pool provides an extra large surface. It’s the ultimate sunbathing pool for adults to share a cool, connected tanning experience in your backyard or by the swimming pool.

Expansive comfort for two.This oversized inflatable tanning pool lounger redefines shared comfort. The removable pillow and expansive ribbed air cushion base offer ample support for two, setting a new standard for spacious pool floats adult designed for relaxation together.

The centerpiece of any gathering.Command attention at your next backyard garden party. This substantial inflatable lounge pool comes with two 3”drink holders and a wrap-around grab line, providing a stable and social floating platform. It's the definitive tanning pool for backyard entertainment.

Reinforced for shared durability.Constructed to support multiple users, this inflatable tanning bed uses premium 0.3mm PVC for enhanced resilience. The pool bed float features integrated pad eyes for secure tying, ensuring this blow up pool remains a durable focal point among tanning pools.

Statement luxury, surprisingly portable.Despite its generous dimensions, this sun tanning pool is designed for adventure. The tanning pool lounger sets up quickly, transforming any beach, lakefront, or pools into a luxurious retreat. Its impressive size and design make it a standout pool float.
